faq.title: Questions from Our Customers
faq.description: Clear answers to everything you need to know
faq.q1: How long does it take to manufacture and deliver the majlis?
faq.a1: The delivery time for Saharan seating is 10 to 15 days from the date the deposit is received. We ensure top quality at every stage of manufacturing.
faq.q2: How does payment and delivery work?
faq.a2: Payment is in two installments: a 50% deposit via bank transfer, and the remaining 50% is paid to the delivery company "Amana" upon receipt. Delivery fees are a symbolic 100 MAD, payable upon foam delivery.
faq.q3: What materials are used in making the seating?
faq.a3: We use premium woven cotton fabric and Dolidol HD 5 Bassmat foam — number 1 quality with a 25-year warranty. Authentic Saharan seating can only be made with authentic materials.
faq.q4: What are the dimensions of the Saharan seating?
faq.a4: We make Saharan floor seating that is 15 cm high and 70 cm wide. If you want seating higher than 15 cm, you can place it on a raised wooden platform.
faq.q5: Can I return the majlis if I don't like it?
faq.a5: Yes, to encourage you to order from us, we offer a full refund if you are not satisfied with the Saharan seating within 3 days of delivery.
faq.q6: Can I see the material quality before ordering?
faq.a6: For the foam: you can ask your nearest mattress maker about the quality of Dolidol HD 5 Bassmat foam. For the fabric: we can send you a sample to inspect the quality.
faq.q7: How do I care for the Saharan seating?
faq.a7: It is recommended to wash the fabrics inside out, using cold water or at a temperature not exceeding 30°C. Tumble drying is prohibited; let the fabrics air dry naturally. Avoid poking or pulling the fabric with sharp objects to preserve its luxurious texture and natural sheen.
faq.q8: Can the seating be used indoors and outdoors?
faq.a8: Our products are handmade with premium quality to suit various spaces: living rooms, tents, restaurants, offices — making them ideal for both indoor and outdoor use. They work in the living room, den, balcony, tent, or garden.

privacy.title: Personal Data Protection Policy
privacy.intro: We are committed to protecting your privacy and personal data in accordance with Moroccan Law No. 09-08 on the Protection of Individuals with Regard to the Processing of Personal Data.

dataController.title: 1. Data Controller
dataController.description: {company} (hereinafter referred to as "we" or "the Company") is the controller responsible for processing your personal data.
dataController.addressValue: Al Wahda District, behind Jarda August 14 - Dakhla, Kingdom of Morocco

dataCollection.title: 2. Data We Collect
dataCollection.description: We collect the following personal data:
dataCollection.contactInfoDesc: Email address, phone number, postal address
dataCollection.technicalDataDesc: IP address, browser type, device used (to improve user experience)

dataUsage.title: 3. Purpose of Data Collection
dataUsage.description: We use your personal data for the following purposes:
dataUsage.orderProcessingDesc: To receive and process your orders for products and custom designs
dataUsage.communicationDesc: To respond to your inquiries and communicate with you regarding your orders
dataUsage.improvementDesc: To improve our services and user experience on our website
dataUsage.legalComplianceDesc: To comply with our legal and regulatory obligations

legalBasis.title: 4. Legal Basis for Processing
legalBasis.description: We process your personal data on the basis of:
legalBasis.consentDesc: When you submit an order or fill out a form on our website
legalBasis.contractExecutionDesc: To process your orders and provide our services
legalBasis.legitimateInterestDesc: To improve our services and protect our business

dataSharing.title: 5. Data Sharing
dataSharing.description: We do not sell or rent your personal data to any third party. We may share your data only in the following cases:
dataSharing.serviceProvidersDesc: Delivery companies and technical assistants who help us provide our services
dataSharing.importantNoteDesc: We do not process any financial payments on our website. All financial transactions are conducted directly between the customer and the Company after contact.

yourRights.title: 6. Your Rights
yourRights.description: In accordance with Moroccan Law No. 09-08, you have the following rights:
yourRights.accessRightDesc: Obtain a copy of your personal data
yourRights.deletionRightDesc: Request the deletion of your data (subject to legal conditions)
yourRights.objectionRightDesc: Object to the processing of your data
yourRights.portabilityRightDesc: Obtain your data in a machine-readable format
yourRights.exerciseRights: To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at: {email}

dataSecurity.title: 7. Data Security
dataSecurity.description: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, loss, or damage:
dataSecurity.accessControl: Access restricted to authorized personnel only

dataRetention.title: 8. Data Retention Period
dataRetention.description: We retain your personal data for the period necessary to fulfill the stated purposes, or as required by Moroccan law:
dataRetention.orderDataDesc: 10 years (in accordance with accounting and tax requirements)
dataRetention.accountDataDesc: Until deletion is requested or 3 years of inactivity

cookies.title: 9. Cookies
cookies.description: We use only necessary cookies to improve your experience on our website, subject to your consent:
cookies.cookieControl: You can manage cookies through your browser settings.

contactUs.title: 10. Contact Us
contactUs.description: If you have any questions about our Privacy Policy or wish to exercise your rights, please contact us:

complaint.title: 11. Your Right to File a Complaint
complaint.description: If you believe we have not handled your personal data in accordance with the law, you have the right to file a complaint with the National Commission for the Control of Personal Data Protection (CNDP):
complaint.cndpName: National Commission for the Control of Personal Data Protection (CNDP)
complaint.cndpAddress: Address: Hay Riad, Rue Dahmani, Rabat, Morocco

policyUpdates.title: 12. Updates to This Policy
policyUpdates.content1: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any material changes by posting the new policy on our website with an updated "last updated" date.
policyUpdates.content2: We recommend reviewing this page periodically to stay informed about how we protect your data.

terms.title: General Terms of Use and Sale
terms.intro: Please read these terms carefully before using our website or ordering our products. By using the website, you agree to be bound by these terms.

generalInfo.title: 1. General Information
generalInfo.description: The website {website} (hereinafter referred to as "the Website") is an online platform owned by {company}, specializing in the design and sale of traditional Moroccan Saharan seating.
generalInfo.addressValue: Al Wahda District, behind Jarda August 14 - Dakhla, Kingdom of Morocco
generalInfo.governingLaw: These terms are governed by Moroccan law, in particular Law No. 31-08 on Consumer Protection and Law No. 53-05 on the Electronic Exchange of Legal Data.

services.title: 2. Description of Services
services.description: We offer the following services through our website:
services.individualProductsDesc: Seating, cushions, armrests (coudoir), and other traditional pieces
services.customDesignsDesc: Smart calculation of seating arrangements based on measurements provided by the customer
services.consultationsDesc: Advice on the selection and design of seating arrangements
services.importantNoteDesc: Our website does not process any financial payments. We only collect your orders, and payment and delivery are agreed upon directly between the customer and the Company via phone or email. Payment is made upon delivery or after direct agreement.

orderProcess.title: 3. Order Process
orderProcess.description: The order process proceeds as follows:
orderProcess.step1Desc: The customer selects products or uses the smart calculation tool to obtain a custom design
orderProcess.step2Desc: The customer fills out the order form with contact and delivery information
orderProcess.step3Desc: We contact the customer by phone or email to confirm the order and discuss details and pricing
orderProcess.step4Desc: The payment method (cash on delivery, bank transfer, etc.) and estimated delivery date are agreed upon
orderProcess.step5Desc: We manufacture the order according to the agreed specifications and deliver it to the specified address
orderProcess.bindingNote: The order becomes binding only after direct communication and agreement on all details between us and the customer.

pricing.title: 4. Pricing
pricing.description: Prices displayed on the website are indicative and listed in Moroccan dirhams (MAD). Final prices:
pricing.customization: May vary depending on customization and final dimensions
pricing.finalPrice: Are determined definitively during direct communication with the customer
pricing.taxInclusive: Include all applicable taxes in Morocco (VAT 20%)
pricing.priceChange: We reserve the right to modify prices at any time; however, prices agreed upon with the customer remain unchanged

delivery.title: 5. Delivery
delivery.deliveryTimeDesc: 10 to 15 days from the date the deposit is received
delivery.deliveryAreaDesc: We deliver to all cities in Morocco via the carrier "Amana"
delivery.paymentMethodDesc: 50% deposit via bank transfer, and the remaining 50% paid to the carrier "Amana" upon delivery
delivery.deliveryCostDesc: A nominal fee of 100 MAD, payable upon receipt of the foam
delivery.inspectionOnDeliveryDesc: The customer is advised to inspect the products upon receipt and immediately report any issues

returnsAndExchanges.title: 6. Right of Return and Exchange
returnsAndExchanges.description: In accordance with Moroccan Law No. 31-08 on Consumer Protection, the customer is entitled to:
returnsAndExchanges.moneyBackGuaranteeDesc: You have 3 days from the date of delivery to obtain a full refund if you are not satisfied with the Saharan seating
returnsAndExchanges.customProductsDesc: The same guarantee applies to all products — 3 days for a full refund
returnsAndExchanges.returnConditionsDesc: The product must be in its original condition, unused, with all accessories and packaging
returnsAndExchanges.refundDesc: A full refund is issued within 14 days from the date the return is accepted
returnsAndExchanges.returnContact: For returns or exchanges, please contact us at {email} or {phone} within the specified period.

warranty.title: 7. Warranty
warranty.description: We offer a warranty on our products against manufacturing defects:
warranty.foamWarrantyDesc: 25 years on Dolidol HD 5 Bassmat foam — number 1 quality
warranty.warrantyCoverageDesc: Manufacturing defects in foam and fabric, stitching and filling issues
warranty.warrantyExclusionsDesc: Damage resulting from improper use, stains, or tears caused by misuse

liability.title: 8. Website Liability
liability.description: We make every effort to ensure the accuracy of information on our website; however:
liability.availability: We do not guarantee that the website will be available at all times without interruption
liability.colorVariation: Actual product colors may differ slightly from the images displayed due to screen settings
liability.indirectDamage: We are not liable for any indirect damage that may result from the use of the website
liability.limitedLiability: Our liability is limited to the value of the order in question

intellectualProperty.title: 9. Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.description: All content on the website (images, text, logo, designs) is protected by intellectual property rights under Moroccan law. The following is prohibited:
intellectualProperty.noCopy: Copying or reproducing any content without prior written authorization
intellectualProperty.noLogoUse: Using the logo or brand name without permission
intellectualProperty.noCommercialUse: Any commercial use of the website content

disputes.title: 10. Governing Law and Disputes
disputes.description: These terms are governed by Moroccan law. In the event of a dispute:
disputes.amicableDesc: We always encourage direct communication to resolve any issue
disputes.mediationDesc: Mediation may be pursued before any judicial proceedings
disputes.jurisdictionDesc: In the event that an amicable resolution fails, the Moroccan courts shall have jurisdiction
disputes.consumerProtectionDesc: Moroccan consumers may benefit from the protection of legally recognized consumer protection associations.

contactUs.title: 11. Contact Us
contactUs.description: For any questions regarding these terms or our services, please contact us:
contactUs.availability: We are available Saturday through Thursday from 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM (Morocco time)

termsModification.title: 12. Modification of Terms
termsModification.content1: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Modifications take effect immediately upon publication on the website.
termsModification.content2: Orders confirmed prior to any modification remain subject to the terms in effect at the time of the order.
termsModification.content3: We recommend reviewing this page regularly to stay informed of any updates.

aboutUs.title: Dakhla Majalis
aboutUs.subtitle: The first Moroccan brand specialized in Saharan floor majlis
aboutUs.description: Dakhla Majalis is the first Moroccan brand specialized in the production of traditional Saharan floor majlis and goat-hair tents, inspired by the rich heritage of the Moroccan Sahara.
aboutUs.products: We design and manufacture a range of products including Saharan majlis, outdoor and excursion majlis, traditional tents, مخزانية tents, tea majlis, poufs, and home accessories and decorations.
aboutUs.quality: Our majlis are made using premium materials, including high-quality woven cotton fabric and Dolidol HD 5 bassmat foam, with a 25-year warranty on the foam through our partnership with Dolidol.
aboutUs.delivery: We deliver to all cities across Morocco, with a production and delivery time of 10 to 20 days.
aboutUs.goal: Our goal is to offer authentic, elegant, and durable Saharan majlis that bring the spirit of the Moroccan Sahara into any space.
aboutUs.location: Address: Al Wahda District, behind the 14 August Garden – Dakhla, Morocco.
aboutUs.videoTitle: Watch our interview on Med Radio

shipping.title: Delivery Method
shipping.intro: Ensuring optimal transport quality and product protection
shipping.methodDesc: To ensure optimal transport quality and product protection, the delivery of Sahrawi salons is organized as follows:
shipping.foam: The foam of the salon is delivered directly by our partner Dolidol
shipping.fabric: The fabric and covers are shipped via Amana or Ozone Express delivery companies
shipping.timesDesc: Delivery times may vary depending on the type of product:
shipping.inStockTime: Usually delivered within 2 to 7 business days depending on the city
shipping.madeToOrderDesc: Such as customized Sahrawi salons or traditional tents
shipping.madeToOrderTime: Manufacturing and delivery time usually ranges from 10 to 20 days

cgv.title: Terms and Conditions of Sale
cgv.intro: These Terms and Conditions of Sale govern the relationship between Dakhla Majalis and any customer placing an order through our website.
cgv.s1Desc: The website's main purpose is to showcase our products and allow customers to submit order requests for:
cgv.s1Note: Any order placed on the site implies acceptance of these terms.
cgv.s2Desc: The Dakhla Majalis website allows customers to submit order requests. Upon receiving an order request, our team contacts the customer to confirm the details. The order is validated only after a 50% deposit is paid and subject to product availability or manufacturing feasibility.
cgv.s3Desc: To confirm an order, the payment terms are as follows:
cgv.s3Item1: 50% of the total amount is paid in advance via bank transfer to validate the order and initiate product preparation or manufacturing.
cgv.s3Item2: The remaining 50% is paid upon delivery to the delivery company.
cgv.s3Note: An order is considered confirmed only after the deposit has been received.
cgv.s4Desc: Some of our products are handcrafted or made-to-order, and availability may vary. Final order confirmation depends on:
cgv.s4Item2: Or the time required for manufacturing
cgv.s4Note: If a product is unavailable, the customer will be informed as soon as possible.
cgv.s5Desc: Any modification or cancellation must be reported as soon as possible. If the product has already been manufactured, some modifications or cancellations may no longer be possible.
cgv.s6Desc: To prevent non-serious or fraudulent orders, an order is considered valid only after:
cgv.s6Item1: Confirmation of customer information (name, phone number, address)
cgv.s6Item2: Validation of order details with the customer
cgv.s6Note: Dakhla Majalis reserves the right to cancel or refuse any order in case of incomplete or incorrect information or if the required deposit is not received.

returnPolicy.title: Our Return Policy
returnPolicy.intro: At Dakhla Majalis, customer satisfaction is our top priority.
returnPolicy.mainPolicy: We offer our customers the option to return any purchased product if it does not suit them, within 3 days of the delivery date, with a full refund of the amount paid in complete transparency, provided the return conditions are met.
returnPolicy.condition1: The product must be in its original condition, without damage or signs of use.
returnPolicy.condition2: The return request must be reported within a maximum of 3 days after receiving the product.
returnPolicy.condition3: Return shipping costs are the responsibility of the customer, except in cases of manufacturing defects.
returnPolicy.support: Our team remains available to answer your questions and assist you throughout your purchase.
